source_note: Phase O1a 2026-05-10: operational notation seed for visual verification. Source: FootbagMoves.com sample (curator-reviewed); normalized to ALL-CAPS + square-brackets per RENDERING_SURFACE_PROPOSAL §4. Note: FM canonical name is "Blurry Mirage" (= +2 rotational reading); IFPA pt10 names this trick "Stepping Paradox Mirage" (= flat-+1 reading). Both reach ADD=4 via different decompositions; see OPERATIONAL_NOTATION_GRAMMAR §5.1.

See OPEN_QUESTIONS.md §1C and red_corrections_pt10.csv CANDIDATE_CORE row.
